notes.intent: Expose exactly one vault interface to Josemar
notes.routing: Route must be provided explicitly by the caller
notes.playbooks: Playbook paths are no longer stored here. SKILL.md is the public surface for high-traffic routes; low-traffic routes have their playbook referenced from SKILL.md.

onboarding.summary: Initialize vault or port existing vault with safety gates

payload.state_key: required string to isolate multi-turn onboarding sessions

template.inspect.summary: Inspect one template metadata and fields

note.create.summary: Create a new markdown note in the vault (alias for note.capture)

payload.text: string (the note body). Required when no template is selected.
payload.title: string (becomes the filename after slugification). Required when no template is selected (see heuristic_capture_rules).
payload.template_hint: optional string (presence of any template selector makes text and title optional)
payload.template_path: optional relative path (presence makes text and title optional)
payload.template_id: optional string (presence makes text and title optional)

note.capture.summary: Create a new markdown note in the vault

payload.text: string (the note body). Required when no template is selected.
payload.title: string (becomes the filename after slugification). Required when no template is selected (see heuristic_capture_rules).
payload.template_hint: optional string (presence of any template selector makes text and title optional)
payload.template_path: optional relative path (presence makes text and title optional)
payload.template_id: optional string (presence makes text and title optional)

note.read.summary: Read full note content and frontmatter

payload.text: optional string (required unless mode is frontmatter)
payload.frontmatter_fields: optional object (required when mode is frontmatter)
payload.section_heading: optional string (required when mode is section_append or section_prepend)

note.rename.summary: Rename a note in place (and optionally rewrite wikilinks across the vault)

payload.new_title: required string (becomes the new filename after slugification)

transcribe.summary: Transcription flow kept dormant until backend setup
